title: Design & Simulation Lab
tagline: Software tools for electronic design automation, mechanical CAD, and embedded simulation.

equipment.name: MATLAB / Simulink
equipment.purpose: Mathematical modelling, signal processing, and control system simulation

equipment.name: SolidWorks
equipment.purpose: 3D mechanical CAD, FEA structural analysis, and product design

equipment.name: Proteus Design Suite (ISIS + ARES)
equipment.purpose: Electronic schematic capture, PCB layout, and embedded simulation

equipment.name: ANSYS (Academic)
equipment.purpose: Finite element analysis for structural, thermal, and fluid dynamics

equipment.name: Cadence Virtuoso / Allegro (Academic)
equipment.purpose: Analog/mixed-signal IC design and PCB layout

equipment.name: Python / TensorFlow / PyTorch Workstations
equipment.purpose: Machine learning model development and training

equipment.name: AutoCAD
equipment.purpose: 2D/3D drafting for product and enclosure design

equipment.name: COMSOL Multiphysics (Academic)
equipment.purpose: Multi-physics simulation for sensors, MEMS, and biomedical devices

equipment.name: High-Performance Computing Workstations
equipment.purpose: GPU-accelerated computation for simulation and deep learning
